function.name: _wb_query_task_list
function.description: Query the workbench workflow task list assigned to the current user (aggregated across apps and modules), filterable by pending or completed.

status.description: 'doing' for pending tasks, 'done' for completed tasks.

processInstanceName.description: Filter by process instance name (fuzzy match).

pageIndex.description: Page index, starting from 1. Default is 1.
